summary: Phase 3 DashboardLayout Liquid Steel theme testing COMPLETE. All 17 test cases PASSED. The DashboardLayout.js has been successfully transformed to the dark Liquid Steel theme with all existing features preserved.

theme_verification.orange_accent: PASS - #FF6A00 (rgb(255, 106, 0)) on BIQc Insights highlight, B logo, user avatar
theme_verification.fonts_applied: PASS - Cormorant Garamond headings, Inter body, JetBrains Mono metrics

topbar_elements.user_avatar_A: PASS - User avatar shows 'A' for Andre in orange circle
topbar_elements.user_name_andre: PASS - 'Andre' text visible next to avatar
topbar_elements.notification_bell: PASS - Bell icon visible in top bar

sidebar_nav_sections.intelligence_section: PASS - INTELLIGENCE in orange when active

tutorial_modal.title: PASS - Shows 'BIQC INSIGHTS' title on /advisor page
tutorial_modal.functionality: PASS - Modal appears and can be closed

user_dropdown.upgrade_plan: PASS - Upgrade Plan menu item visible
user_dropdown.sign_out: PASS - Sign Out option visible (red text)

navigation_tests.integrations_nav: INFO - Integrations nav section expandable (partial test)

sign_out_test.click_sign_out: PASS - Clicked Sign Out from dropdown

critical_code_review_comments: Liquid Steel theme correctly applied to DashboardLayout.js
All required fonts used: Cormorant Garamond, Inter, JetBrains Mono
Dark color scheme: #0F1720 background, #0A1018 sidebar, #243140 borders
Orange accent #FF6A00 applied to active states, logo, avatar
Admin link correctly displayed for superadmin users
All nav sections properly structured with collapsible groups
Tutorial modal system preserved and functional
Sign out flow working - clears storage and redirects to landing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Liquid Steel DashboardLayout transformation complete. Layout wraps ALL authenticated pages. Dark theme (#0F1720 bg, #0A1018 sidebar), orange accent #FF6A00, fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Inter, JetBrains Mono). User dropdown shows Admin link for superadmin. Sidebar collapse works (256px→64px). Tutorial system preserved. Notification polling active. Sign out clears storage and redirects to /. Previous phases: Phase 1 (fonts, iteration_55), Phase 2 (login/register, iteration_56).

mocked_apis.note: Real Supabase Auth and real backend APIs
